S.FORM: Rafael Addison 7 bulad 22 demiad, 1964 a mihca, Rafael Addison, miunduay.
S.PHON: *afaər~ɾ addison * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, *afaər~ɾ addison, miunduaj.
